query: SELECT id, periodLabel, periodStart, periodEnd, totalAmount/100 as totalAmt, grandTotal/100 as grandTot, zomatoAmount/100 as zomato, swiggyAmount/100 as swiggy, dineInAmount/100 as dineIn, cgst/100 as cgst, sgst/100 as sgst FROM delivery_sales_uploads WHERE (periodStart >= '2026-04-01' AND periodStart < '2026-05-01') OR (periodEnd > '2026-04-01' AND periodStart < '2026-04-01') ORDER BY periodStart;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT id, periodLabel, periodStart, periodEnd, totalAmount/100 as totalAmt, grandTotal/100 as grandTot, zomatoAmount/100 as zomato, swiggyAmount/100 as swiggy, dineInAmount/100 as dineIn, cgst/100 as cgst, sgst/100 as sgst FROM delivery_sales_uploads WHERE (periodStart >= '2026-04-01' AND periodStart < '2026-05-01') OR (periodEnd > '2026-04-01' AND periodStart < '2026-04-01') ORDER BY periodStart;
